raw_alert.title: CloudOpsBench boutique/service/1

commonAnnotations.description: The Kubernetes environment in namespace `boutique` is experiencing a fault. Diagnose the root cause of this incident.

raw_alert.error_message: The Kubernetes environment in namespace `boutique` is experiencing a fault. Diagnose the root cause of this incident.

alert_json.error_message: The Kubernetes environment in namespace `boutique` is experiencing a fault. Diagnose the root cause of this incident.

final_state.plan_rationale: Starting with critical incident in boutique namespace. Initial strategy: (1) GetAlerts to identify what metrics/conditions triggered the critical alert and form root-cause hypotheses; (2) GetResources to map deployed services in the namespace and identify which service(s) are affected; (3) GetErrorLogs and GetRecentLogs to inspect error patterns and distinguish between competing failure modes (pod crashes, resource exhaustion, connectivity issues, misconfiguration). This sequence rapidly narrows from symptom to mechanism without requiring deep resource inspection until we know which service is faulty and what the actual failure pattern is.

retrieval_controls.GetResources: time_bounds=None filters=[FilterCondition(field='namespace', operator='eq', value='boutique')] limit=None fields=FieldSelection(include=['kind', 'name', 'status', 'namespace'], exclude=None) aggregation=None
